calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff In Pro Per with Irving Schurz; Jason Alderson, Esquire for/with Tyrone Nelson and George Waskey

Parties place a stipulation for settlement on the record as follows: Defendants to pay Plaintiff $800 by the end of the day on 11/16/06. Defendants to pay rent of $400 for 12/6/06
on 12/15/06; rent of $400 for 1/7/07 payable on 1/15/07. Each month rent is due provided defendants are in possession of premises. The rent is to be paid to plaintiff as follows: Defendant to come to the premises between 4:00-6:00 pm and payment made at that time. Defendant waives rental deposit. Plaintiff to write a letter to the owner of the building to correct the front door lock and water pressure at the premises. Plaintiff to talk to Ms. Dumais re making her best efforts to promptly distribute the mail when received and not to turn off the utilities including water and electricity. Parties to allow reasonable access to the laundry room. If defendants default in this agreement, Plaintiff may submit a declaration re default to the Court for immediate writ of possession of the premises. All parties understand and agree to the terms and conditions of settlement as stated on the record this date. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk Kay Peek, Reporter Janet Pond CSR #5292 (218)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Denied
